ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow WakeMap to access your location to track distance to your destination.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow WakeMap to track location in the background and wake you up when you arrive, even when the app is closed.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow WakeMap to track location in the background and wake you up when you arrive, even when the app is closed.
